case_title: RICHARD OLAGUE VS. KINDRED NURSING CENTERS WEST LLC. DBA KINDRED

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DEMURRING PARTY IN SUPPORT OF AUTOMATIC EXTENSION (TRANSACTION ID # 100041677) FILED BY DEFENDANT KINDRED HEALTHCARE OPERATING, INC. KINDRED NURSING CENTERS WEST, LLC DBA KINDRED TRANSITIONAL CARE REHABILITATION - GOLDEN GATE
DECLARATION OF DECLARATION SUSAN KANG GORDON ISO MOTION TO ADVANCE TRIAL DATE (TRANSACTION ID # 100043118) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLAGUE, RICHARD

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-21-2018 IN 206 -- APPEARANCES BY SUSAN Y. KANG GORDON, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF RICHARD OLAGUE; MATTHEW SCHROEDER, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS KINDRED NURSING CENTERS WEST LLC DBA KINDRED AND KINDRED HEALTHCARE OPERATING, INC. -- THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS 11/26/18 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 WITH A LAST DAY OF 12/19/18. LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS IS 11/22/18. SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS SHALL BE BROUGHT ON 30 DAYS NOTICE PURSUANT TO RELEVANT PROVISION OF THE C.C.P., UNLESS THE PARTIES STIPULATE OTHERWISE. TIME TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY NOT YET SERVED IS SHORTENED TO 20 DAYS. RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY ALREADY SERVED ARE DUE 20 DAYS OF THIS HEARING OR BY THE DATE DETERMINED BY THE C.C.P., WHICHEVER IS EARLIER. FACT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 11/16/18. EXPERT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 11/23/18. ELECTRONIC SERVICE IS EQUIVALENT TO PERSONAL SERVICE. IF THERE IS ANY KIND OF ISSUE/DISPUTE THAT REQUIRES MEET AND CONFER, SUCH MEET AND CONFER SHALL NOT BE MADE VIA E-MAIL OR LETTER. IT SHALL OCCUR IN PERSON OR VIA TELEPHONE. IF PARTIES ARE REQUESTING A JURY TRIAL, JURY FEES MUST BE PAID BY 4:00 PM ON 8/21/18. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
